requirement_topic.en: UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 Transport Safety — Mandatory for Lithium Battery Sea Freight to Maldives
requirement_topic.zh: UN 38.3与IEC 62281运输安全——马尔代夫锂电池海运强制要求
requirement_topic.zht: UN 38.3與IEC 62281運輸安全——馬爾地夫鋰電池海運強制要求

summary.en: UN 38.3 (Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods — Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3) specifies eight mandatory transport safety tests (T1 Altitude Simulation, T2 Thermal Test, T3 Vibration, T4 Shock, T5 External Short Circuit, T6 Impact/Crush, T7 Overcharge, T8 Forced Discharge) for all lithium metal and lithium-ion cells and batteries. IEC 62281 (Safety of Primary and Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries During Transport) provides the design and testing framework harmonised with UN 38.3. CRITICAL MALDIVES NOTE: all BESS hardware imports to Maldives arrive exclusively by sea freight — there is no direct cargo aircraft link for large BESS systems to most atolls. Sea freight routes from China to Maldives transit through Colombo (Sri Lanka) or Port Klang (Malaysia) hub ports before onward feeder vessel to Malé (MIFCO port or MPA Malé port) and then further feeder or inter-island vessel to outer atolls. The IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code) applies to all sea freight legs. Since January 1, 2020, a UN 38.3 Test Summary is mandatory documentation for all lithium battery sea shipments under IMDG. BESS cells and modules exported from China to Maldives must have a valid UN 38.3 Test Summary from an accredited laboratory before shipment. The multi-leg trans-shipment through Colombo and feeder vessel legs means packaging must maintain integrity across multiple handling events — this is a more demanding packaging requirement than a single-port direct shipment.
summary.zh: UN 38.3（危险货物运输建议书——测试和标准手册第三部分第38.3节）规定了所有锂金属和锂离子电芯及电池的8项强制运输安全测试（T1高度模拟、T2热测试、T3振动、T4冲击、T5外部短路、T6冲击/挤压、T7过充电、T8强制放电）。IEC 62281（运输过程中一次和二次锂电芯及电池安全）提供与UN 38.3协调的设计和测试框架。马尔代夫重要提示：所有BESS硬件进口至马尔代夫均仅通过海运抵达——大多数环礁没有针对大型BESS系统的直接货机航线。从中国至马尔代夫的海运路线经科伦坡（斯里兰卡）或巴生港（马来西亚）转运港，然后通过支线船到达马累（MIFCO港或MPA马累港），再通过进一步支线船或岛际船运至外部环礁。IMDG规则（国际海运危险货物规则）适用于所有海运航段。自2020年1月1日起，UN 38.3测试摘要是IMDG下所有锂电池海运货物的强制文件。从中国出口至马尔代夫的BESS电芯和模组须在出货前由认可实验室出具有效的UN 38.3测试摘要。经科伦坡的多航段中转及支线船航段意味着包装须在多次搬运中保持完整性——这是比单一港口直接运输更严格的包装要求。
summary.zht: UN 38.3（危險貨物運輸建議書——測試和標準手冊第三部分第38.3節）規定了所有鋰金屬和鋰離子電芯及電池的8項強制運輸安全測試（T1高度模擬、T2熱測試、T3振動、T4衝擊、T5外部短路、T6衝擊/擠壓、T7過充電、T8強制放電）。IEC 62281（運輸過程中一次和二次鋰電芯及電池安全）提供與UN 38.3協調的設計和測試框架。馬爾地夫重要提示：所有BESS硬件進口至馬爾地夫均僅通過海運抵達——大多數環礁沒有針對大型BESS系統的直接貨機航線。從中國至馬爾地夫的海運路線經科倫坡（斯里蘭卡）或巴生港（馬來西亞）轉運港，然後通過支線船到達馬累（MIFCO港或MPA馬累港），再通過進一步支線船或島際船運至外部環礁。IMDG規則（國際海運危險貨物規則）適用於所有海運航段。自2020年1月1日起，UN 38.3測試摘要是IMDG下所有鋰電池海運貨物的強制文件。從中國出口至馬爾地夫的BESS電芯和模組須在出貨前由認可實驗室出具有效的UN 38.3測試摘要。經科倫坡的多航段中轉及支線船航段意味著包裝須在多次搬運中保持完整性——這是比單一港口直接運輸更嚴格的包裝要求。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods, Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 (mandatory transport safety tests T1–T8 for all lithium cells and batteries)
IEC 62281 — Safety of Primary and Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries During Transport (design and testing framework harmonised with UN 38.3)
IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code) — applies to all sea freight legs for lithium battery imports to Maldives
UN Model Regulations, 7th revised edition (2021) — Test Summary requirement in force since January 1, 2020
Maldives Ports Limited (MPL) / MPA — port authority for Malé; no Maldives-specific dangerous goods exemption confirmed as of dataset date

summary.en: Chinese BESS cell and module manufacturers are required to comply with UN 38.3 for export shipments under international transport conventions. Chinese manufacturers typically hold UN 38.3 test reports and test summaries from CNAS-accredited testing laboratories such as UL, SGS, Bureau Veritas, TÜV, or CAICT. The UN 38.3 Test Summary (required since January 1, 2020) must cover the specific cell or battery type being shipped. IEC 62281 compliance is generally covered by the same test programme as UN 38.3. A Chinese-origin UN 38.3 test summary from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is acceptable for Maldives-bound sea shipments under IMDG — the key gaps for Maldives are: (1) ensuring the test summary covers the specific cell model, chemistry, capacity, and configuration of the BESS units being shipped; (2) the multi-leg trans-shipment routing through Colombo and outer-atoll feeder vessels creates more handling events than a single-port delivery, requiring packaging vibration and shock qualification at the upper end of UN 38.3 T3/T4 parameters; (3) high-humidity container conditions on tropical sea routes may require additional desiccant packaging for long-duration container transits.
summary.zh: 中国BESS电芯和模组制造商须依据国际运输公约对出口货物遵守UN 38.3。中国制造商通常持有来自CNAS认可测试实验室（如UL、SGS、Bureau Veritas、TÜV或CAICT）的UN 38.3测试报告和测试摘要。自2020年1月1日起要求的UN 38.3测试摘要须涵盖所运输的特定电芯或电池类型。IEC 62281合规通常由与UN 38.3相同的测试计划涵盖。来自ILAC认可实验室的中国产地UN 38.3测试摘要可用于IMDG下运往马尔代夫的海运货物——马尔代夫的主要差距：（1）确保测试摘要涵盖所运输BESS单元的特定电芯型号、化学体系、容量和配置；（2）经科伦坡的多航段中转路线及外部环礁支线船比单一港口交付产生更多搬运事件，要求在UN 38.3 T3/T4参数上限处进行包装振动和冲击资质认证；（3）热带海运路线上集装箱内的高湿条件可能需要为长期集装箱运输额外添加干燥剂包装。
summary.zht: 中國BESS電芯和模組製造商須依據國際運輸公約對出口貨物遵守UN 38.3。中國製造商通常持有來自CNAS認可測試實驗室（如UL、SGS、Bureau Veritas、TÜV或CAICT）的UN 38.3測試報告和測試摘要。自2020年1月1日起要求的UN 38.3測試摘要須涵蓋所運輸的特定電芯或電池類型。IEC 62281合規通常由與UN 38.3相同的測試計畫涵蓋。來自ILAC認可實驗室的中國產地UN 38.3測試摘要可用於IMDG下運往馬爾地夫的海運貨物——馬爾地夫的主要差距：（1）確保測試摘要涵蓋所運輸BESS單元的特定電芯型號、化學體系、容量和配置；（2）經科倫坡的多航段中轉路線及外部環礁支線船比單一港口交付產生更多搬運事件，要求在UN 38.3 T3/T4參數上限處進行包裝振動和衝擊資質認證；（3）熱帶海運路線上貨櫃內的高濕條件可能需要為長期貨櫃運輸額外添加乾燥劑包裝。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test reports and test summaries from CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories (CAICT, UL China, SGS China, Bureau Veritas China, TÜV Rheinland China) — acceptable under IMDG for Maldives sea freight if the test summary covers the specific cell/battery type being shipped
IEC 62281 compliance typically covered by same test programme as UN 38.3

gap.en: The fundamental gap is documentation scope, currency, and Maldives-specific packaging considerations — not standard equivalence (UN 38.3 is universal). Exporters should verify: (a) the UN 38.3 test summary covers the specific cell model (including chemistry, capacity, and format) being exported — a summary for a different cell model or capacity is not transferable; (b) the test summary is from a currently ILAC-accredited laboratory; (c) any cell design change since the original UN 38.3 testing triggers a reassessment; (d) module-level and battery-pack-level assemblies may require separate UN 38.3 assessment if they constitute a battery as defined under IMDG; (e) packaging must be designed for multi-leg trans-shipment via Colombo hub port and outer-atoll feeder vessels — vibration and shock accumulation across multiple handling events is higher than single-port delivery; (f) high-humidity tropical sea route conditions (Indian Ocean container humidity can exceed 80% RH) may require desiccant packaging inserts for BESS components sensitive to humidity during long-duration container transit; (g) state-of-charge (SoC) shipping requirements under IMDG — confirm SoC limit with the shipping agent before each departure.
gap.zh: 根本差距在于文件范围、时效性及马尔代夫特有的包装考量——而非标准等效性（UN 38.3是普遍要求）。出口商应核实：（a）UN 38.3测试摘要涵盖所出口的特定电芯型号（包括化学体系、容量和规格）——针对不同电芯型号或容量的测试摘要不可转用；（b）测试摘要来自当前仍获ILAC认可的实验室；（c）自最初UN 38.3测试以来的任何电芯设计变更均触发重新评估；（d）若模组和电池包组件按IMDG定义构成电池，可能需要单独进行UN 38.3评估；（e）包装须针对经科伦坡转运港和外部环礁支线船的多航段中转设计——多次搬运事件累积的振动和冲击高于单一港口交付；（f）热带海运路线的高湿条件（印度洋集装箱湿度可超过80%RH）可能需要为对长期集装箱运输中湿度敏感的BESS部件添加干燥剂包装；（g）IMDG下的荷电状态（SoC）运输要求——在每次出发前向运输代理确认SoC限制。
gap.zht: 根本差距在於文件範圍、時效性及馬爾地夫特有的包裝考量——而非標準等效性（UN 38.3是普遍要求）。出口商應核實：（a）UN 38.3測試摘要涵蓋所出口的特定電芯型號（包括化學體系、容量和規格）——針對不同電芯型號或容量的測試摘要不可轉用；（b）測試摘要來自當前仍獲ILAC認可的實驗室；（c）自最初UN 38.3測試以來的任何電芯設計變更均觸發重新評估；（d）若模組和電池包組件按IMDG定義構成電池，可能需要單獨進行UN 38.3評估；（e）包裝須針對經科倫坡轉運港和外部環礁支線船的多航段中轉設計——多次搬運事件累積的振動和衝擊高於單一港口交付；（f）熱帶海運路線的高濕條件（印度洋貨櫃濕度可超過80%RH）可能需要為對長期貨櫃運輸中濕度敏感的BESS部件添加乾燥劑包裝；（g）IMDG下的荷電狀態（SoC）運輸要求——在每次出發前向運輸代理確認SoC限制。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under international maritime transport law (IMDG Code) for all lithium battery sea freight to Maldives — applies universally with no Maldives-specific exemption; sea freight is the only viable mode for large BESS systems
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under international transport conventions for all lithium battery export shipments from China

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) — Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods; IMDG Code administered by IMO

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 transport compliance is universal — a Chinese-origin test summary from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is accepted for Maldives sea freight under IMDG provided it covers the specific cell model and is current. Maldives-specific risks beyond standard UN 38.3 compliance: multi-leg trans-shipment via Colombo hub port and outer-atoll feeder vessels requires packaging qualified for cumulative handling events; tropical Indian Ocean sea route humidity may require desiccant inserts; SoC limits must be confirmed with the shipping agent. Engage a dangerous-goods shipping agent experienced with Maldives routing (Colombo or Port Klang trans-shipment, Malé port, outer-atoll feeder) to confirm packaging, marking, and documentation requirements before each shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3运输合规是普遍要求——来自ILAC认可实验室的中国产地测试摘要可用于IMDG下的马尔代夫海运货物，前提是涵盖特定电芯型号且保持最新状态。超出标准UN 38.3合规的马尔代夫特有风险：经科伦坡转运港和外部环礁支线船的多航段中转要求包装通过累积搬运事件资质认证；热带印度洋海运路线湿度可能要求干燥剂；须向运输代理确认SoC限制。聘请熟悉马尔代夫路线（科伦坡或巴生港中转、马累港、外部环礁支线船）的危险品运输代理，在每次出货前确认包装、标识和文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3運輸合規是普遍要求——來自ILAC認可實驗室的中國產地測試摘要可用於IMDG下的馬爾地夫海運貨物，前提是涵蓋特定電芯型號且保持最新狀態。超出標準UN 38.3合規的馬爾地夫特有風險：經科倫坡轉運港和外部環礁支線船的多航段中轉要求包裝通過累積搬運事件資質認證；熱帶印度洋海運路線濕度可能要求乾燥劑；須向運輸代理確認SoC限制。聘請熟悉馬爾地夫路線（科倫坡或巴生港中轉、馬累港、外部環礁支線船）的危險品運輸代理，在每次出貨前確認包裝、標識和文件要求。

requirement_topic.en: Outer-Atoll Last-Mile Logistics — Container Sizing, Crane Capacity, and Feeder Vessel Constraints
requirement_topic.zh: 外部环礁末端物流——集装箱尺寸、起重机容量及支线船限制
requirement_topic.zht: 外部環礁末端物流——貨櫃尺寸、起重機容量及支線船限制

summary.en: Maldives outer-atoll BESS installations face a unique last-mile logistics constraint with no equivalent in most other export markets. Once BESS containers arrive at Malé port, they must be transferred to inter-island cargo vessels (dhoni or cargo barge) for delivery to outer atolls. These feeder vessels typically have: maximum lifting capacity of 5–20 tonnes per lift (versus 30+ tonnes for standard 20-foot ISO container); maximum deck space for 1–2 ISO containers per voyage; shallow-draft berths at outer atolls that may not accommodate loaded vessels above 1.5–2.0 metres draught; no shoreside crane — cargo must be discharged using the vessel's own derrick or by pontoon. These constraints mean that standard 20-foot or 40-foot ISO BESS container systems may be too heavy or too large for direct outer-atoll delivery. Project specifications for FENAKA outer-atoll BESS installations typically require BESS units to be designed in modular sections not exceeding 10–15 tonnes per lift, with all equipment rated for marine deck exposure during sea transit (salt spray, wave motion). This is a system-design constraint, not a standards gap — but it directly affects what Chinese BESS container formats can be supplied without repackaging or modular redesign.
summary.zh: 马尔代夫外部环礁BESS安装面临在大多数其他出口市场无可比拟的独特末端物流限制。BESS集装箱抵达马累港后，须转运至岛际货运船（Dhoni或货驳船）以运送至外部环礁。这些支线船通常具有：最大起重容量每次吊装5至20吨（相比标准20英尺ISO集装箱的30吨以上）；每航次最多1至2个ISO集装箱的甲板空间；外部环礁的浅吃水泊位可能无法容纳超过1.5至2.0米吃水的满载船只；无岸边起重机——货物须使用船自身吊杆或通过浮桥卸载。这些限制意味着标准20英尺或40英尺ISO BESS集装箱系统可能因过重或过大而无法直接运至外部环礁。FENAKA外部环礁BESS安装的项目规格通常要求BESS单元设计为每次吊装不超过10至15吨的模块化分段，所有设备须通过海上运输中甲板暴露（盐雾、波浪运动）的海洋级评定。这是系统设计限制，而非标准差距——但它直接影响可以在不重新包装或模块化重新设计的情况下供应的中国BESS集装箱格式。
summary.zht: 馬爾地夫外部環礁BESS安裝面臨在大多數其他出口市場無可比擬的獨特末端物流限制。BESS貨櫃抵達馬累港後，須轉運至島際貨運船（Dhoni或貨駁船）以運送至外部環礁。這些支線船通常具有：最大起重容量每次吊裝5至20噸（相比標準20英尺ISO貨櫃的30噸以上）；每航次最多1至2個ISO貨櫃的甲板空間；外部環礁的淺吃水泊位可能無法容納超過1.5至2.0米吃水的滿載船隻；無岸邊起重機——貨物須使用船自身吊杆或通過浮橋卸載。這些限制意味著標準20英尺或40英尺ISO BESS貨櫃系統可能因過重或過大而無法直接運至外部環礁。FENAKA外部環礁BESS安裝的項目規格通常要求BESS單元設計為每次吊裝不超過10至15噸的模塊化分段，所有設備須通過海上運輸中甲板暴露（鹽霧、波浪運動）的海洋級評定。這是系統設計限制，而非標準差距——但它直接影響可以在不重新包裝或模塊化重新設計的情況下供應的中國BESS貨櫃格式。

standards_or_laws: FENAKA Corporation — utility operator for outer atolls; project-specific transport and installation specifications for BESS delivery and siting on outer islands
IMDG Code — applies to all sea freight legs including inter-island feeder vessel transport of lithium batteries
IMO MSC.1/Circ.1525 — Interim guidance to masters on cargo carried on open decks (relevant for deck-exposed container transport on outer-atoll feeder vessels)
IEC 60068-2-52 — Environmental Testing: Salt Mist, Cyclic (marine deck exposure qualification relevant to open-deck feeder vessel transit)

summary.en: Standard Chinese BESS container products are designed for road transport and port crane unloading (20-foot or 40-foot ISO container, 20–30+ tonnes gross weight). These formats assume: port crane unloading, paved access road to installation site, and no significant weight or dimensional constraint beyond standard ISO container handling. No Chinese domestic BESS standard addresses outer-atoll feeder vessel weight limitations (5–20 tonne lift) or open-deck marine transit requirements. Chinese BESS exporters winning Maldives FENAKA outer-atoll tenders may need to redesign standard container BESS products into modular sub-units of 10–15 tonnes per lift, with marine-grade weatherproofing for open-deck transit and revised IMDG dangerous-goods documentation covering the modular sub-unit format.
summary.zh: 标准中国BESS集装箱产品针对公路运输和港口起重机卸载设计（20英尺或40英尺ISO集装箱，总重20至30吨以上）。这些格式假设：港口起重机卸载、到安装场地的铺装道路及超出标准ISO集装箱处理的无重大重量或尺寸限制。没有中国国内BESS标准涉及外部环礁支线船重量限制（5至20吨起重）或开甲板海洋运输要求。赢得马尔代夫FENAKA外部环礁招标的中国BESS出口商可能需要将标准集装箱BESS产品重新设计为每次吊装10至15吨的模块化子单元，配备适用于开甲板运输的船用级防风雨保护，并修订涵盖模块化子单元格式的IMDG危险货物文件。
summary.zht: 標準中國BESS貨櫃產品針對公路運輸和港口起重機卸載設計（20英尺或40英尺ISO貨櫃，總重20至30噸以上）。這些格式假設：港口起重機卸載、到安裝場地的鋪裝道路及超出標準ISO貨櫃處理的無重大重量或尺寸限制。沒有中國國內BESS標準涉及外部環礁支線船重量限制（5至20噸起重）或開甲板海洋運輸要求。贏得馬爾地夫FENAKA外部環礁招標的中國BESS出口商可能需要將標準貨櫃BESS產品重新設計為每次吊裝10至15噸的模塊化子單元，配備適用於開甲板運輸的船用級防風雨保護，並修訂涵蓋模塊化子單元格式的IMDG危險貨物文件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36276-2023 — standard ambient design; no outer-atoll feeder vessel weight or deck exposure provisions
Standard 20-foot ISO container BESS formats (20–30+ tonne gross weight) — may not be compatible with outer-atoll feeder vessel crane capacity without modular redesign

gap.en: Gap: Standard Chinese BESS container formats (20-foot or 40-foot ISO, 20–30+ tonne gross) are typically incompatible with outer-atoll feeder vessel lift capacity and draft constraints. This is a system-design and logistics gap, not a standards test gap. Exporters bidding on FENAKA outer-atoll tenders should: (a) confirm per-lift weight limits and vessel crane capacity with FENAKA before finalising BESS system design; (b) design BESS in modular sub-units of 10 tonnes or less per lift if required by the outer-atoll logistics chain; (c) ensure modular sub-unit BESS packaging is rated for open-deck marine transit — salt spray, wave motion, and direct sun exposure during inter-island feeder vessel transit; (d) revise UN 38.3 and IMDG dangerous-goods documentation to cover the modular sub-unit format if the format differs from the original UN 38.3 tested configuration; (e) plan for extended delivery timelines — outer-atoll freight adds 2–4 weeks to Malé port arrival; battery SoC management during extended transit must be documented.
gap.zh: 差距：标准中国BESS集装箱格式（20英尺或40英尺ISO，总重20至30吨以上）通常与外部环礁支线船起重容量和吃水限制不兼容。这是系统设计和物流差距，而非标准测试差距。参与FENAKA外部环礁招标的出口商应：（a）在最终确定BESS系统设计前向FENAKA确认每次起重重量限制和船舶起重机容量；（b）若外部环礁物流链要求，将BESS设计为每次起重10吨或以下的模块化子单元；（c）确保模块化子单元BESS包装通过开甲板海洋运输额定——岛际支线船运输过程中的盐雾、波浪运动和直接日晒；（d）若格式与最初UN 38.3测试配置不同，修订UN 38.3和IMDG危险货物文件以涵盖模块化子单元格式；（e）计划延长的交付时间线——外部环礁货运在马累港抵达基础上额外增加2至4周；长时间运输中的电池SoC管理须记录在案。
gap.zht: 差距：標準中國BESS貨櫃格式（20英尺或40英尺ISO，總重20至30噸以上）通常與外部環礁支線船起重容量和吃水限制不兼容。這是系統設計和物流差距，而非標準測試差距。參與FENAKA外部環礁招標的出口商應：（a）在最終確定BESS系統設計前向FENAKA確認每次起重重量限制和船舶起重機容量；（b）若外部環礁物流鏈要求，將BESS設計為每次起重10噸或以下的模塊化子單元；（c）確保模塊化子單元BESS包裝通過開甲板海洋運輸額定——島際支線船運輸過程中的鹽霧、波浪運動和直接日曬；（d）若格式與最初UN 38.3測試配置不同，修訂UN 38.3和IMDG危險貨物文件以涵蓋模塊化子單元格式；（e）計畫延長的交付時間線——外部環礁貨運在馬累港抵達基礎上額外增加2至4週；長時間運輸中的電池SoC管理須記錄在案。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific design and logistics requirement — FENAKA outer-atoll installation projects specify per-lift weight limits and marine transit requirements; no single published mandatory standard; IMDG Code applies universally to all sea freight legs
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — Chinese domestic BESS container formats are designed for road and port-crane delivery; no Chinese standard addresses outer-atoll feeder vessel constraints

source.publisher: FENAKA Corporation — utility operator for outer-atoll islands in Maldives

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Standard Chinese 20-foot or 40-foot ISO BESS container formats weighing 20–30+ tonnes may be incompatible with outer-atoll feeder vessel crane capacity (typically 5–20 tonne per lift) and shallow-draft berth constraints. This is a project design and logistics constraint unique to Maldives outer-atoll delivery, not a standards equivalence gap. Confirm FENAKA per-lift weight limits and vessel crane specifications before finalising BESS system design. If modular sub-unit redesign is required, ensure revised UN 38.3 / IMDG documentation covers the new format and all packaging is rated for open-deck marine transit.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重达20至30吨以上的标准中国20英尺或40英尺ISO BESS集装箱格式可能与外部环礁支线船起重机容量（通常每次起重5至20吨）及浅吃水泊位限制不兼容。这是马尔代夫外部环礁交付特有的项目设计和物流限制，而非标准等效性差距。在最终确定BESS系统设计前向FENAKA确认每次起重重量限制和船舶起重机规格。若需要模块化子单元重新设计，确保修订的UN 38.3 / IMDG文件涵盖新格式，且所有包装通过开甲板海洋运输额定。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重達20至30噸以上的標準中國20英尺或40英尺ISO BESS貨櫃格式可能與外部環礁支線船起重機容量（通常每次起重5至20噸）及淺吃水泊位限制不兼容。這是馬爾地夫外部環礁交付特有的項目設計和物流限制，而非標準等效性差距。在最終確定BESS系統設計前向FENAKA確認每次起重重量限制和船舶起重機規格。若需要模塊化子單元重新設計，確保修訂的UN 38.3 / IMDG文件涵蓋新格式，且所有包裝通過開甲板海洋運輸額定。

requirement_topic.en: State-of-Charge (SoC) Management and IMDG Documentation for Extended Multi-Leg Maldives Sea Transit
requirement_topic.zh: 荷电状态（SoC）管理与马尔代夫多航段海运延长运输的IMDG文件
requirement_topic.zht: 荷電狀態（SoC）管理與馬爾地夫多航段海運延長運輸的IMDG文件

summary.en: IMDG Code Special Provision 961 and related provisions impose state-of-charge (SoC) limits on large lithium-ion batteries shipped as cargo. For BESS cells and modules shipped at cells exceeding 100 Wh, IMDG requires a maximum SoC of 30% for most shipping configurations unless the consignment is covered by a competent authority approval for higher SoC. Multi-leg Maldives routing — from Chinese port to Colombo or Port Klang (hub), then to Malé, then to outer-atoll feeder vessel — can add 4–6 weeks to total transit time compared to direct-port delivery markets. Extended transit at low SoC in high-temperature equatorial container conditions (container interior can reach 55–60°C in tropical sea routes) creates additional battery degradation risk. Exporters should: (a) confirm the applicable IMDG SoC limit for the specific cell and module format being shipped; (b) document SoC at departure, expected SoC loss during transit, and minimum acceptable SoC on arrival for BMS initialisation; (c) include battery conditioning and re-charging procedures at the Malé port staging area before outer-atoll feeder vessel dispatch in the project logistics plan; (d) confirm that IMDG documentation (Dangerous Goods Declaration, packing certificate, Test Summary) covers the SoC as shipped and the specific BESS unit configuration.
summary.zh: IMDG规则特别规定961及相关规定对作为货物运输的大型锂离子电池规定了荷电状态（SoC）限制。对于超过100 Wh的BESS电芯和模组，IMDG要求大多数运输配置的最大SoC为30%，除非货物持有主管机关批准更高SoC。马尔代夫多航段路线——从中国港口到科伦坡或巴生港（枢纽），再到马累，然后到外部环礁支线船——相比直接港口交付市场可额外增加4至6周总运输时间。低SoC下在热带海运路线高温赤道集装箱条件下（热带海运路线中集装箱内部温度可达55至60°C）的长期运输造成额外电池劣化风险。出口商应：（a）确认所运输特定电芯和模组格式的适用IMDG SoC限制；（b）记录出发时的SoC、运输过程中预期的SoC损失及BMS初始化时可接受的最低到达SoC；（c）在项目物流计划中包含马累港暂存区在外部环礁支线船调度前的电池调理和再充电程序；（d）确认IMDG文件（危险货物申报书、包装证书、测试摘要）涵盖运输时的SoC及具体BESS单元配置。
summary.zht: IMDG規則特別規定961及相關規定對作為貨物運輸的大型鋰離子電池規定了荷電狀態（SoC）限制。對於超過100 Wh的BESS電芯和模組，IMDG要求大多數運輸配置的最大SoC為30%，除非貨物持有主管機關批准更高SoC。馬爾地夫多航段路線——從中國港口到科倫坡或巴生港（樞紐），再到馬累，然後到外部環礁支線船——相比直接港口交付市場可額外增加4至6週總運輸時間。低SoC下在熱帶海運路線高溫赤道貨櫃條件下（熱帶海運路線中貨櫃內部溫度可達55至60°C）的長期運輸造成額外電池劣化風險。出口商應：（a）確認所運輸特定電芯和模組格式的適用IMDG SoC限制；（b）記錄出發時的SoC、運輸過程中預期的SoC損失及BMS初始化時可接受的最低到達SoC；（c）在項目物流計畫中包含馬累港暫存區在外部環礁支線船調度前的電池調理和再充電程序；（d）確認IMDG文件（危險貨物申報書、包裝證書、測試摘要）涵蓋運輸時的SoC及具體BESS單元配置。

standards_or_laws: IMDG Code Special Provision 961 — state-of-charge limits for large lithium-ion batteries shipped as cargo
UN 38.3 — transport safety tests include T7 Overcharge and T8 Forced Discharge relevant to SoC limits
IMO MSC.1/Circ.1544 — interim guidelines for carriage of lithium-ion batteries (relevant for multi-modal and feeder vessel legs)
IMDG Code Section 4.1 — packing instructions for lithium battery consignments including SoC documentation requirements

summary.en: Chinese BESS manufacturers shipping to export markets are generally familiar with UN 38.3 and IMDG SoC documentation requirements. Standard Chinese export practice involves shipping BESS cells at 30% SoC or below and providing a Dangerous Goods Declaration with Test Summary. However, the extended transit time to Maldives outer atolls (4–6 weeks longer than typical Middle East or Southeast Asia direct-port routes) may result in: self-discharge below minimum acceptable BMS initialisation SoC for LFP or NMC cells; elevated risk of cell imbalance in battery modules during extended low-SoC storage at high container temperatures; and re-charging requirements at Malé port staging area before onward feeder vessel dispatch. Chinese manufacturers should confirm with their dangerous-goods shipping agent and the Maldives project logistics plan that SoC management procedures cover the full multi-leg transit duration.
summary.zh: 向出口市场发货的中国BESS制造商通常熟悉UN 38.3和IMDG SoC文件要求。标准中国出口实践涉及在30%SoC或以下运输BESS电芯，并提供附测试摘要的危险货物申报书。然而，至马尔代夫外部环礁的延长运输时间（比典型中东或东南亚直接港口路线长4至6周）可能导致：LFP或NMC电芯自放电低于BMS初始化可接受的最低SoC；长期低SoC储存在高集装箱温度下导致电池模组内电芯失衡风险升高；以及在外部环礁支线船调度前在马累港暂存区的再充电要求。中国制造商应向其危险品运输代理和马尔代夫项目物流计划确认SoC管理程序涵盖全程多航段运输持续时间。
summary.zht: 向出口市場發貨的中國BESS製造商通常熟悉UN 38.3和IMDG SoC文件要求。標準中國出口實踐涉及在30%SoC或以下運輸BESS電芯，並提供附測試摘要的危險貨物申報書。然而，至馬爾地夫外部環礁的延長運輸時間（比典型中東或東南亞直接港口路線長4至6週）可能導致：LFP或NMC電芯自放電低於BMS初始化可接受的最低SoC；長期低SoC儲存在高貨櫃溫度下導致電池模組內電芯失衡風險升高；以及在外部環礁支線船調度前在馬累港暫存區的再充電要求。中國製造商應向其危險品運輸代理和馬爾地夫項目物流計畫確認SoC管理程序涵蓋全程多航段運輸持續時間。

standards_or_laws: Standard Chinese export IMDG DG Declaration practice with UN 38.3 Test Summary — covers SoC at time of departure; does not address extended multi-leg transit SoC management
GB/T 36276-2023 — storage and transport SoC recommendations for lithium EES batteries (Chinese domestic guidance; not equivalent to IMDG SoC management requirements for international sea freight)

gap.en: Gap: Standard Chinese BESS export IMDG documentation addresses SoC at departure but does not typically cover SoC management across the extended 4–6 week multi-leg Maldives routing. The combination of low initial SoC (30%), tropical container temperatures (55–60°C interior), and extended transit time creates risk of: BMS initialisation failure on arrival; cell imbalance requiring balancing charge before commissioning; and warranty claim complications if cells arrive below manufacturer-specified minimum SoC. Exporters should: (a) calculate expected SoC on arrival based on cell self-discharge rate at projected transit temperatures for the full Maldives routing duration; (b) include a re-charging and balancing procedure at Malé port staging area in the project O&M plan; (c) document the minimum acceptable SoC on arrival in the project handover documentation; (d) confirm with the shipping agent that IMDG documentation covers the SoC as shipped and is consistent with the specific cell model, capacity, and module configuration.
gap.zh: 差距：标准中国BESS出口IMDG文件涉及出发时的SoC，但通常不涵盖马尔代夫4至6周多航段路线延长运输期间的SoC管理。低初始SoC（30%）、热带集装箱温度（内部55至60°C）和延长运输时间的组合造成以下风险：到达时BMS初始化失败；需要在调试前进行均衡充电的电芯失衡；若电芯到达时低于制造商规定的最低SoC则引发保修索赔复杂情况。出口商应：（a）基于全程马尔代夫路线持续时间的预计运输温度下的电芯自放电率计算预期到达SoC；（b）在项目运维计划中包含马累港暂存区的再充电和均衡程序；（c）在项目移交文件中记录可接受的最低到达SoC；（d）向运输代理确认IMDG文件涵盖运输时的SoC且与特定电芯型号、容量和模组配置一致。
gap.zht: 差距：標準中國BESS出口IMDG文件涉及出發時的SoC，但通常不涵蓋馬爾地夫4至6週多航段路線延長運輸期間的SoC管理。低初始SoC（30%）、熱帶貨櫃溫度（內部55至60°C）和延長運輸時間的組合造成以下風險：到達時BMS初始化失敗；需要在調試前進行均衡充電的電芯失衡；若電芯到達時低於製造商規定的最低SoC則引發保修索賠複雜情況。出口商應：（a）基於全程馬爾地夫路線持續時間的預計運輸溫度下的電芯自放電率計算預期到達SoC；（b）在項目運維計畫中包含馬累港暫存區的再充電和均衡程序；（c）在項目移交文件中記錄可接受的最低到達SoC；（d）向運輸代理確認IMDG文件涵蓋運輸時的SoC且與特定電芯型號、容量和模組配置一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — IMDG SoC limits apply to all lithium battery sea freight legs; SoC management for extended Maldives multi-leg transit is a project logistics requirement not addressed by a single published standard
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under IMDG for export sea freight — standard Chinese practice addresses departure SoC; extended Maldives routing requires additional planning not covered by Chinese domestic standards

source.publisher: International Maritime Organization (IMO) — IMDG Code and related circulars

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Extended multi-leg Maldives sea routing (4–6 weeks total transit including outer-atoll feeder vessel) combined with IMDG 30% SoC shipping limit and tropical container temperatures (up to 60°C interior) creates SoC management risks not present in standard direct-port export routes. Confirm cell self-discharge rate at 55°C, calculate expected SoC on arrival at outer atoll, and include Malé port re-charging and balancing procedures in the project O&M plan. Ensure IMDG documentation covers the SoC as shipped and the specific BESS unit configuration before each shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 延长的马尔代夫多航段海运路线（包括外部环礁支线船的4至6周总运输时间）、IMDG 30%SoC运输限制及热带集装箱温度（内部最高60°C）的组合，造成标准直接港口出口路线中不存在的SoC管理风险。确认55°C时的电芯自放电率，计算外部环礁到达时的预期SoC，并在项目运维计划中包含马累港再充电和均衡程序。在每次出货前确认IMDG文件涵盖运输时的SoC及具体BESS单元配置。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 延長的馬爾地夫多航段海運路線（包括外部環礁支線船的4至6週總運輸時間）、IMDG 30%SoC運輸限制及熱帶貨櫃溫度（內部最高60°C）的組合，造成標準直接港口出口路線中不存在的SoC管理風險。確認55°C時的電芯自放電率，計算外部環礁到達時的預期SoC，並在項目運維計畫中包含馬累港再充電和均衡程序。在每次出貨前確認IMDG文件涵蓋運輸時的SoC及具體BESS單元配置。
